adb.name: ADB (Android Debug Bridge)
adb.description: Default mode for debugging and basic operations
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options: Settings > About Phone > tap Build Number 7 times
2. Enable USB Debugging: Settings > Developer Options > USB Debugging
3. Connect device to computer via USB cable
4. Allow USB Debugging permission on device
5. Tool will auto-detect device
troubleshooting: Device not detected: Try different USB port or cable
Permission denied: Reconnect device and tap 'Allow' again
Offline: Restart ADB server or unplug/replug device

fastboot.name: Fastboot
fastboot.description: Used for bootloader operations and firmware flashing
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options: Settings > About Phone > tap Build Number 7 times
2. Enable OEM Unlock: Settings > Developer Options > OEM Unlock (if available)
3. Boot into Fastboot mode:
- Android 5-10: Hold Volume Down + Power, select 'Fastboot'
- Android 11+: Hold Volume Down + Power until boot menu appears
4. Connect USB cable while in Fastboot
5. Tool will auto-detect device in Fastboot mode
troubleshooting: Device not detected: Try different USB port or install Fastboot drivers
Permission denied: May need root/admin privileges
Bootloader already unlocked: Can proceed directly to flashing

recovery.name: Recovery Mode
recovery.description: Used for sideloading and system recovery operations
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options and USB Debugging
2. Boot into Recovery mode:
- Most devices: Hold Volume Up + Power
- Some Samsung: Hold Volume Up + Home + Power
- Pixel: adb reboot recovery (from ADB mode)
3. Connect USB cable
4. Select 'Sideload' or 'Apply update from ADB' in recovery menu
5. Tool will auto-detect device
troubleshooting: Wrong recovery menu: Try different key combination
Permission denied: Ensure USB Debugging was enabled before boot
Can't mount partitions: Try factory reset or recovery reflash

edl.name: EDL Mode (9008)
edl.description: Qualcomm Download Mode - lowest level access, can unbrick devices
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options and USB Debugging
2. Boot into Download Mode (varies by device):
- Most Qualcomm: adb reboot edl (from ADB)
- Some devices: Hold Volume Down + Power during boot
- Some Xiaomi: Hold Volume Down + Power for 30+ seconds
3. Device will show 'Qualcomm HS-USB QDLoader 9008' in Windows Device Manager
4. Connect USB cable and install Qualcomm drivers if needed
5. Tool will auto-detect and can flash firmware
troubleshooting: Not appearing as 9008: Device may need driver installation
EDL command failed: Ensure EDL mode enabled in device settings
Stuck in EDL: Perform hard reset (hold power for 30 seconds)

mediatek_meta.name: MediaTek META Mode
mediatek_meta.description: MediaTek equivalent of Qualcomm EDL mode
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options and USB Debugging
2. Boot into META mode (varies by device):
- Most MediaTek: adb reboot meta (from ADB)
- Some devices: Hold Volume Down + Power for 30 seconds
- Alternative: Hold Volume Up + Home + Power
3. Device will appear as 'MediaTek Preloader' in Device Manager
4. Connect USB cable
5. Tool can now access NVRAM and flash firmware
troubleshooting: Device reboots to Android: Try different key combination
Not detected: Install MediaTek drivers
NVRAM locked: May need OTA tool or secondary method

samsung_odin.name: Samsung Download Mode (Odin)
samsung_odin.description: Samsung's firmware flashing mode using Odin protocol
setup_steps: 1. Enable Developer Options and USB Debugging
2. Turn off device completely
3. Boot into Download Mode:
- Hold Volume Down + Home + Power
- Press Volume Up to confirm and enter mode
4. Device shows 'Odin Mode' or 'Download Mode' message
5. Connect USB cable
6. Tool will auto-detect device and can flash firmware
troubleshooting: Can't enter Download Mode: Try again, holding all buttons until Download Mode screen
Device detection failed: Install Samsung USB drivers
Checksum error: Firmware file may be corrupted or wrong model

bootloader.name: Bootloader/Bootrom Mode
bootloader.description: Low-level bootloader access for vendor operations
setup_steps: 1. Device must be in Fastboot or EDL/META mode
2. Tool automatically provides bootloader access when appropriate
3. Operations performed by tool don't require manual mode switching
troubleshooting: Bootloader access denied: OEM unlock may be required first
Operation not supported: Device bootloader may not allow this
